top_tweets.text: watching Figma, a $10B UX design monopoly, melt down with a single Claude tweet. https://t.co/7OJRaVduvv
top_tweets.author: Hesamation
top_tweets.name: ℏεsam
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出 Claude Design，讓使用者透過對話建立原型、簡報與文件，由 Opus 4.7 視覺模型驅動。推文指出這對 Figma 這個 100 億美元的 UX 設計工具構成直接衝擊。

context.quoted_text:
Introducing Claude Design by Anthropic Labs: make prototypes, slides, and one-pagers by talking to Claude.

Powered by Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable vision model. Available in research preview on the Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans, rolling out throughout the day. https://t.co/2BgBGtgYGX

top_tweets.text:
Anthropic's Chief Product Officer sat on Figma's board.

Figma integrated Claude as their AI assistant.

On Monday he resigned from Figma. 

The same day, reports surfaced that Anthropic was building design tools.

Yesterday Anthropic launched Claude Design.

A direct Figma
top_tweets.author: TheGeorgePu
top_tweets.name: George Pu
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 首席產品長原本在 Figma 董事會任職，週一辭職當天就傳出 Anthropic 正在開發設計工具，隔天隨即推出 Claude Design 直接競爭 Figma。時間點與動作引發利益衝突與商業道德討論。

top_tweets.text: there are likely ~100 ppl alive today that deeply understand all of these together: product instinct, what makes good software, design, technical depth, a real model of ai, the psychology of a single user, the shape of culture, team building, the ability to motivate, & the
top_tweets.author: signulll
top_tweets.name: signüll
top_tweets.summary_zh: 目前全球可能只有約 100 人同時深刻理解：產品直覺、優質軟體、設計、技術深度、AI 模型、使用者心理、文化趨勢、團隊建設與激勵能力等跨領域能力。

top_tweets.text:
Anthropic just walked into the two fastest-growing product categories in AI and said "we'll take it from here."

Prototypes. Lovable hit $400M ARR with 146 employees. Cursor is valued at $29.3B. Bolt, v0, Replit Agent. A $48B+ vibe-coding category built entirely on foundation
top_tweets.author: aakashgupta
top_tweets.name: Aakash Gupta
top_tweets.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出的原型工具與程式碼助手，直接切入由 Lovable、Cursor、Bolt、v0、Replit Agent 等公司建立的「vibe coding」賽道，該市場估值已超過 480 億美元。

top_tweets.text:
product management tip: ragebaiting your user base/player base by making inaccurate claims about the quality of your systems is an incredibly fast way of identifying current problems with your software that you can then prioritize fixes for

easily the top reason I’m on here
top_tweets.author: drewlevin
top_tweets.name: Drew Levin
top_tweets.summary_zh: 產品管理技巧：透過對使用者/玩家社群發布不精確的系統品質聲明來引發討論（ragebait），可以快速辨識出軟體的當前問題並排定修復優先順序。

top_tweets.text:
The AI debate is difficult because one side views art as a product to be delivered as fast as possible. 

It's like going to a lake and telling fisherman that it's "more efficient" to buy fish from the grocery store. They aren't just there for the fish.
top_tweets.author: sean_gause
top_tweets.name: Sean // Hear Tell of Hauntings🥀
top_tweets.summary_zh: AI 辯論的核心分歧在於一方把藝術視為「盡快交付的產品」，就像告訴釣客直接去超市買魚更有效率——他們在乎的不只是結果本身。

top_tweets.text: Love vibe coding games. It gives me a deep appreciation for the time and effort that have gone into traditional games. It's clear that the majority of effort is spent tweaking stats, game play, story writing, level editing, narrative creation, etc. The long tail of polish.
top_tweets.author: martin_casado
top_tweets.name: martin_casado
top_tweets.summary_zh: 透過 vibe coding 製作遊戲讓人深刻體會傳統遊戲開發的價值：多數心力其實花在調整數值、遊戲體驗、劇本撰寫、關卡編輯、敘事創作等細節打磨的長尾工作上。

top_tweets.text:
Claude Opus 4.7 is so good I just bought two Max subscriptions.

After vibe coding for over 12 hours yesterday I can confirm this is the best model in the world.

It burns tokens fast.

But the coding output is unmatched.

Two $200/month Max plans so I never hit a rate limit https://t.co/HfK1Vm0ePS
top_tweets.author: bridgemindai
top_tweets.name: BridgeMind
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Opus 4.7 在程式撰寫（vibe coding）上表現極佳，但消耗 token 速度很快，作者為此直接訂閱兩個每月 200 美元的 Max 方案以避免觸及用量限制。

top_tweets.text:
vibe coding a SaaS is actually the worst way to go if you want to make money with ai...

it requires a wide range of skills that you probably don't have as of now

not coding skills, but marketing skills

if you're in the need for cash, focus on delivering a simple service
top_tweets.author: EXM7777
top_tweets.name: Machina
top_tweets.summary_zh: 用 vibe coding 開發 SaaS 其實不是用 AI 賺錢的最佳途徑，因為需要的是行銷技能而非程式技能；如果急需現金流，應專注提供簡單服務。

top_tweets.text:
‼️Canada now has A.I. SURVEILLANCE PRICING

with 60 firms operating in this space.

The AI models decide what is the MAX price you will pay for a product based on your habits, income level, desperation etc

...and it charges you as MUCH as possible, without losing the sale. https://t.co/jqIZg69Fzn
top_tweets.author: Tablesalt13
top_tweets.name: Tablesalt 🇨🇦🇺🇸
top_tweets.summary_zh: 加拿大已有 60 家公司採用 AI 動態定價，根據使用者習慣、收入水準、急迫性等因素，在不流失訂單的前提下自動計算每位顧客願意支付的最高價格並收費。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
